statement: Auto-rotating homepage carousels increase engagement and let everyone get their content above the fold.
why_it_spreads: They satisfy competing stakeholder demands for top-of-page placement and look dynamic.
evidence_against: NN/g on carousels (src-nngroup): auto-advancing carousels suffer banner blindness, low click-through beyond the first slide, and accessibility and motion problems.
Auto-rotation conflicts with WCAG pause/stop/hide expectations for moving content (src-wcag22).
replacement_principle: Prefer a single strong message or a static, user-controlled set of promotions; if carousels are used, make them user-initiated, pausable and keyboard accessible.
still_applies_when: User-controlled, non-auto-rotating galleries (e.g. product images) are appropriate
Carousels with clear affordances and few, equally relevant items can be acceptable
